prompts.name: Wet Pavement
prompts.text: Add wet pavement with realistic reflections, uneven surface detail, and light interaction.

prompts.name: Old Stone
prompts.text: Use old stone surfaces with cracks, moss, weathering, and believable age.

prompts.name: Polished Marble
prompts.text: Use polished marble with veining, soft reflections, and refined luxury detail.

prompts.name: Weathered Wood
prompts.text: Use weathered wood with grain, scratches, softened edges, and natural age.

prompts.name: Clean Glass
prompts.text: Use clean glass with transparent reflections, edge highlights, and believable refraction.

prompts.name: Frosted Glass
prompts.text: Use frosted glass with soft diffusion, muted reflections, and subtle surface texture.

prompts.name: Brick Wall
prompts.text: Use a brick wall with mortar lines, uneven color, and real surface variation.

prompts.name: Concrete
prompts.text: Use concrete with subtle pores, stains, cracks, and grounded industrial texture.

prompts.name: Sand
prompts.text: Use sand with fine grains, footprints or wind patterns where appropriate, and natural light response.

prompts.name: Snow Surface
prompts.text: Use snow surface detail with soft accumulation, footprints, sparkle, and cold diffusion.

prompts.name: Water Surface
prompts.text: Use water surface detail with ripples, reflections, transparency, and natural movement.

prompts.name: Scratched Metal
prompts.text: Use scratched metal with small marks, worn edges, and realistic specular highlights.

prompts.name: Ceramic
prompts.text: Use ceramic surfaces with subtle glaze, smooth form, and small imperfections.

prompts.name: Paper
prompts.text: Use paper texture with fibers, folds, soft shadowing, and natural thickness.

prompts.name: Fur Texture
prompts.text: Use fur texture with layered strands, soft volume, and directional lighting.
